Motel Marketing that drives direct bookings.

We install a practical marketing system for independent Australian motels—so “Direct” becomes the default choice, not the lucky outcome.

Motels in [Your Location]

Motel Coach / [Your Motel]

Official site. Fast booking path. Clear room facts.

Official site

The goal: make “Direct” the obvious option.

The 9-Step Motel Marketing System

Clean, sequential, and designed for real motel operations. No messy grids. No fluff.

01

Direct Booking Foundations

Clarify your direct booking path: website, phone, and email. Rates are clear. Policies are simple. Mobile booking is frictionless.

02

OTA Strategy (Not Dependence)

Use OTAs as billboards, not landlords. Tune Booking.com and Expedia to feed direct demand while controlling commission and cancellation risk.

03

Website Speed & Conversion

Target sub-2 second loads on patchy regional connections. Clear room facts, fast booking, and clean layout turn visits into bookings.

04

Local SEO & Maps

Optimise Google Business Profile, local pages, and content so “motel near me” and town searches put you in the top map results.

05

Google Hotel Ads & Interception

Show your direct rate next to the OTAs when guests are ready to book. Intercept intent at the moment of decision.

06

Pricing & Offer Structure

Align marketing with simple pricing rules—weekday vs weekend, events, fenced offers—so campaigns and rates support each other.

07

Reputation & Review Velocity

Increase review volume with a simple, compliant prompt system. Recent reviews lift click-through, bookings, and your rank.

08

AI Marketing: Fact Layer vs. Fluff

AI tools don’t rank adjectives. They rank facts. Replace fluffy copy with dense, verifiable details: King bed sizes, truck parking, Wi‑Fi speeds, late check‑in rules, and real distances.

09

Schema Marketing: Teach Google your motel

Schema is the translator between your website and search engines. Done correctly, it turns your motel into structured, readable data—making it easier for Google and AI tools to surface you for high-intent searches.

Book a motel marketing strategy session.

We'll show you what to fix first so direct bookings become predictable.
